Solist's Earring of Insight  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: EAR
AC: 25
INT: +15 HP: +90 MANA: +90
SV FIRE: +4 SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4 SV MAGIC: +4 SV POISON: +4
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Solist's Earring of Insight
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: EAR
AC: 25
INT: +15 HP: +90 MANA: +90
SV FIRE: +4 SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4 SV MAGIC: +4 SV POISON: +4
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Earring of the Chosen
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:MyztiC
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-11 05:31:02
Page Updated:Sun Feb 20th, 2022

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Vulak`Aerr


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded April 10th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
SK rule the land.

This item is clearly most suitable for an SK imo and should be SK useable, SK are godly. This is a waste on robe casters IMO give it to a real class like shadow knight.

QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 6:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1601857164508
75 posts
This item is pretty badass, as far as most earrings go, but from vulak, i'd kinda expect a little bit more.
mabey some small FT, or some other stats. 4saves 90hp/mana some int, and 25ac (ac is very nice for int caster earrings, mind you).. but considering how tough this guy is and how easy other really good earrings are (see : earring of the solstice), something like FT 1 or 2 would be very nice, or mabey some stam on it (everyone can use hp).
not that I'd turn this earring down, if offered.. but it's just .. hrm.
not something i'd expect off vulak.


mabey FT 7 and instant click, unlimited charges of DA?

;)






last part was a joke for any that didn't get it.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 18 2001 at 11:37 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ummm its got int cuz its a caster item.. why would it be a monk item if they cannot even equip it?? :P **has a cow**
i'm sure its real

# Oct 17 2001 at 2:48 PM Rating: Decent
Drokaten
31 posts
jipp (60 mag cazic thule) posted one of the masks that dropped off this guy (35 ac) and i have seen him since and hes wearing it.. i have known jipp for 2.5 years. if he can drop a 35 ac caster usable mask 15 int 100 hp 100 mana.. this earing is for real

Dokhopper -105 cleric/Drokaten 75th magician

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 17 2001 at 1:37 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It's wt 0, obviously it's a monk item, why does verant keep putting Int (and even worse, Wis) on Monk items?
RE: Why the int?
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2002 at 2:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254980853
101 posts
*SIGH
silly newbies think that cause something has 0 weight it is automatically defaulted to the monk. NEWS FLASH!! every other class in EQ has a weight limit too! its not like my warrior can go carrying around a backpack full of crude iron ore at 15 stones per brick. so before you go making stupid comments, even if you are just joking or being sarcastic or whatever, the whole "Monk Item" joke is getting REALLY overdone.

# Oct 19 2001 at 6:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
This is such a blatant attempt at trolling... why do people keep doing this sort of thing? what does it really add to the discussion about this item? It's a great INT caster earring, and that's all that's to be said about it.
▲ Page top
RE: Why the int?
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 9:40 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250166807
Scholar
69 posts
Clearly, posts like this are not meant to give the wealth of information that we're all accustomed to on these boards. But honestly, we already know where this drops. We know you need to be able to kill Vulak to obtain this item, and we know that there is probably no caster in-game that would turn this item down if it were offered. So, what more is there to discuss? You see the stats, you see that it drops off Vulak. Everything that anyone posts beyond that is either in jest, or to air out their opinion. And theres nothing really wrong with that.
See the size of this thread? How many useful posts could there honestly be? If this were a mid-level item in a new zone it would make sense to have a huge thread that discussed the origin of the item, the approximate level of the associated mob, what kind of crew you'd need to bring the mob down, the precise location, etc.
But because it is customary to only post useful info...
For those of you who don't know - to obtain this item you need an entire guild of approximately level 60 to wipe out every mob in the Temple of Veeshan. Then you have to kill the boss mob of the zone, Vulak'Aerr. He will definitely drop something cool, but you may have to kill him a few times to get this particular goody.
As I said, you need to reach level 60. This will require at least several months of very dedicated EQ play, or you can buy a level 60 character on ebay for about $500-$1000. If you don't have $1000, just go over to your mommy's purse or daddy's wallet when they aren't looking, and look for a plastic card with a bunch of numbers on it. The ebay website refers to this card as a 'credit card', and you can use the numbers on it to get free stuff - including, but not limited to a level 60 warrior or mage or whatever else you may want! And if you need to get your new level 60 into an uber guild, I'm sure they'd gladly let you join if you share those 'credit card' numbers with them. Hope this helps! Happy hunting!


Disclaimer: neither Allakhazam, Illia, or myself are responsible for the actions of your kids. If you have trouble controlling your kids, hide your credit cards in a more secure location, like the vegetable crisper in your fridge, behind the blech-olli.
▲ Page top
